name: Zen's Apps
subtitle: Custom apps for LiveContainer
description: Source for sideloaded apps built via GitHub Actions CI.

apps.name: Tidal Downloader
apps.subtitle: Download and play music from Tidal
apps.versionDescription:
First tagged release.

• Library sorting/grouping with date buckets
• Configurable display attributes
• Search pagination (Load More)
• Album art thumbnails
• Streaming download progress
• Artist name fix for search
• Atomic config writes
apps.localizedDescription: A Flutter iOS app that embeds CPython to run tiddl (Tidal music downloader) on-device. Features streaming playback with varispeed, library management, playlist support, and search with album art.
